mapper.select: SELECT n.id, n.title, f.file_path, n.link_url, n.status, n.start_date, n.end_date, n.priority, n.created_at, n.updated_at FROM notice n LEFT JOIN file f ON n.id = f.target_id AND f.target_type = 'NOTICE' WHERE status='Y' AND NOW() BETWEEN start_date AND end_date ORDER BY priority DESC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice (title, image_path, link_url, status, start_date, end_date, priority, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{imagePath}, #{linkUrl}, 'Y', #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{priority}, NOW(), NOW())
